status: protocol_only; no dataset created in this checkpoint
reuse_policy: The current Phase 5 holdout is analysis/regression data only and must never be reused as a final holdout.

intent_development_expansion.purpose: expand intent paraphrases and hard negatives
intent_development_expansion.target: at least 50 examples per intent, balanced by subject and case_type

validation.target: new samples stratified by intent, subject, case_type and history state

final_holdout.target: new source/templates, frozen before any rule or threshold choice

acceptance_rules: expected labels are reviewed before metrics
record dataset provenance and generation timestamp
